metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for Cairn — trust + reputation auto-rating

plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Trust + reputation auto-rating for sources, MCP servers, and tools. Rates every WebFetch/WebSearch/MCP/Bash-net call in the background; claude-cli rater (default) bills your claude.ai subscription at ~$0.02-0.07/rating. See https://cairnscore.ai/privacy.
